## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Add source(s)
- [ ] Update existing source(s)
- [ ] Remove source(s)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Source checklist

If this PR adds or updates sources, confirm the following:

- [ ] `url` points to a valid RSS/Atom feed
- [ ] feed is public (no auth/paywall required for feed access)
- [ ] metadata fields are complete (`name`, `description`, `site_url`, `language`, `country`, `category`, `genre`)
- [ ] `language` is ISO 639-1
- [ ] `country` is ISO 3166-1 alpha-2
- [ ] JSON is valid and formatted consistently

## Testing and validation

How did you validate the change?

- [ ] Opened/checked the feed URL manually
- [ ] Verified JSON syntax
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Additional context

Anything reviewers should know.
